justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all temporal expressions from the user, including the initial specific time and subsequent requests for flexibility.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively offered alternative times on the requested day and checked for availability in the next week as requested by the user.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent handled the conversation efficiently, making appropriate API calls and providing relevant information without unnecessary turns.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent successfully booking the appointment and confirming details clearly.
